Engineering Club TEDxKHAS Event

The first TEDxKHAS event, held on Sunday, May 5, 2025 at Kadir Has University D Block Grand Hall, was held with great interest with the participation of 357 people. With the theme of “Finding Your Own Voice in the Noise”, 8 speakers from different disciplines shared inspiring insights.

Coach Dr. Ayşegül Özkavukcu and content producer Sude Alkış talked about personal development and digital identity. KAMUFLE and Masis Aram Gözbek discussed the power of art, while Ege Kökenli and Serap Özçelik Arapoğlu shared their career stories. In the last session, Harun Deniz and Sinan Ergin gave in-depth talks on individual potential.

We would like to thank our sponsors who contributed to the event and the Engineering Club team for their dedicated work. TEDxKHAS was an unforgettable start for those who want to find their own voice.
